description:
Cross-platform encrypted email client

Aster Mail is a cross-platform, end-to-end encrypted email client built for Aster Privacy. Features quantum-safe encryption and zero-knowledge architecture.
Aster Mail 1.4.48
- Faster search with a persisted encrypted index
- More reliable inbox syncing and unread counts
- Two-factor authentication fixes and clearer error messages
- Unarchive now available everywhere and stays in sync
- New account onboarding improvements
- Security hardening and stability fixes
Android 0.6.108
- Fixed archived, deleted, and spam emails briefly appearing in the inbox
- Stronger protection for encryption keys in memory
